scripts.test:unit: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./tests/setup/unit.setup.js vitest run --globals --environment node --pool threads tests/unit
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./tests/setup/unit.setup.js vitest run --globals --environment node --pool threads tests/smoke
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./tests/setup/unit.setup.js vitest run --globals --environment node --pool threads --coverage --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text --coverage.reporter html --coverage.include src/**/*.js --coverage.exclude src/docs/**/*.css --coverage.exclude src/docs/**/*.js tests/unit tests/smoke
scripts.ci:backend: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/tictactoe_test npx prisma generate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/tictactoe_test npx prisma validate && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:unit
